title: The Witcher
description: Fantasy RPG modpack with the witcher(more RPG classes) mod. This modpack is built by me using just other mods a lot of other mods and didn't do anything by self.
body:
**So this modpack consists of a lot of mods I smashed together and hoped they'd work some did some didn't(I deleted them obviously) so yeah this isn't anything serious. My only goal was and still to create modpack about witcher and play with my friends and when I'm doing it i also might realise it to the public.**

Some useful info I **stole** from one of the mods i put in this pack(Witcher(more RPG classes) to be exact):
"🪨⛏️**New Ores and Metals**
- New Ores and metals can be found & crafted in the world!
- Steel can be obtained by smelting Iron Ingots in the blasting Furnace
- Silver Ore spawns in caves in Y: -30 - 42
- Dark Iron Ore spawns in caves in Y: -64 - 25
- Meteorite spawns in caves & above mountains in Y: 100 - 320
- Dark Steel Ingots can be crafted with, Steel- & Dark Iron Ingots & Netherite Scraps
- Meteorite Silver Ingots can be crafted with Silver- & Meteorite Ingots & Netherite Scraps
🧬 **Attributes & Spell Schools**
- This Mod adds some new Spell Schools & related Attributes
- Sign-, Aard-, Axii-, Igni-, Quen- & Yrden Spell School
- General Sign intensity which increases the damage of all signs
- Sign Specific Intensity for Aard, Axii, Igni, Quen & Yrden which increase just their signs damage
- Adrenaline Gain, Increases the chance to get the adrenaline effect and increases its duration the higher your Adrenaline Attribute ist
- The Adrenaline Effect increases your attack damage and sign intensity and your sign crit perks
- Enchantments for Signs are also available
🤺**Combat & Equipment**
- You should use Better Combat for the best experience!
- Craft new Steel- and Silverswords and Witcher-themed Armor, you can also find them in chests as loot! You can also craft Witcher-themed Swords out of vanilla materials.
- Vanilla Material Swords are more balanced and hybrid, Silver-Swords are good for a sign build & against undead mobs, Steel-Swords are good for a physical build and against non-undead mobs
Choose your Witcher School Path with your armor set, are you from the Bear, Cat, Griffin or Wolf School?
- As a Witcher you have a big arsenal of spells and skills, which help you in fights.
- 🏹Arrows almost cant hit Witchers because of their magical signs & sword reflexes
- Some Weapons cant be crafted, you can only find them as loot in chests!"
